description_long: This electric fan features a circular, wire-mesh blade guard with a dense grid pattern, enclosing several fan blades. The fan is mounted on a tall, cylindrical stand with a wide, round base for stability, all in a brownish color. The rear of the fan shows a streamlined housing that connects the guard to the stand, with a visible support structure. The fan's overall design is utilitarian, with no visible control panel or power cord. The materials appear to be primarily plastic and metal, with a metallic finish on the guard and a matte plastic finish on the stand and base. The fan is accompanied by two unrelated objects: a spherical mesh and a small, square container, but these are not part of the fan itself.
description: A floor-standing electric fan with a circular wire-mesh guard, brown cylindrical stand, and wide round base. The fan has a metallic guard and matte plastic body, with no visible controls or power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular wire-mesh guard, fan blades, and the full height of the brown stand and base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fan, the depth of the guard, and the connection between the guard and the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the guard, the support structure, and the streamlined housing connecting to the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fan's profile and the rear support structure, with the base and stand visible.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard is a dense wire mesh with concentric rings and radial spokes, made of metal, providing robust protection and visibility of the blades.
